response.justification: Bogdan brings 13+ years of broad, polyglot engineering experience and has worked on high-throughput microservices (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby) plus C/C++ systems work, satisfying the experience-length and language requirements. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature-flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical/bias analysis — the core of this Growth/Experimentation Systems role. Seniority is presented at Staff/Senior IC level rather than demonstrated Principal-scale, cross-org architecture leadership. A reasonable maybe: strong generalist engineer, but unproven in the specific experimentation/measurement domain the role centers on.
strengths: 13+ years engineering across web, backend, mobile, and embedded; exceeds the 8+ year bar
Proven high-scale, low-latency microservices work (millions of req/sec) and C/C++ systems experience
Strong software-craft culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, plus mentoring via workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or rollout-risk platform experience
Limited evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure and statistical/bias-detection data aptitude
Leadership shown is Staff/Senior IC scope, not Principal-level multi-workstream, cross-org architecture ownership
